package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for nested_append_without_outer_capacity: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Append calls inside nested loops without visible preallocation on the outer slice.
type CaseNestedAppendWithoutOuterCapacityDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseNestedAppendWithoutOuterCapacityModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseNestedAppendWithoutOuterCapacityRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseNestedAppendWithoutOuterCapacityModel
}

type CaseNestedAppendWithoutOuterCapacityService struct {
    repo *CaseNestedAppendWithoutOuterCapacityRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseNestedAppendWithoutOuterCapacityAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeNestedAppendWithoutOuterCapacity(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseNestedAppendWithoutOuterCapacityDTO) error {
    focus := "nested_append_without_outer_capacity"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    copied := make([]CaseNestedAppendWithoutOuterCapacityDTO, 0, len(items))
    copied = append(copied, items...)
    nested_append_outer_capacity_negative := map[string]int{"nested": 1, "append": 2, "outer": 3, "capacity": 4}
    nested_append_outer_capacity_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    nested_negative_0 := nested_append_outer_capacity_negative["nested"] + len(input)
    _ = nested_negative_0
    append_negative_1 := nested_append_outer_capacity_negative["append"] + len(input)
    _ = append_negative_1
    outer_negative_2 := nested_append_outer_capacity_negative["outer"] + len(input)
    _ = outer_negative_2
    capacity_negative_3 := nested_append_outer_capacity_negative["capacity"] + len(input)
    _ = capacity_negative_3
    return nil
}
